question: What are the type and title of the books that are not rated?
sql: SELECT Type, Title FROM book WHERE Book_ID NOT IN (SELECT Book_ID FROM review);

back_translation.intent: 获取没有被评论的书籍类型和标题
filters: Book_ID NOT IN (SELECT Book_ID FROM review)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，原始问题和SQL反向翻译描述均旨在获取未被评论的书籍类型和标题，且使用的表、列和过滤条件一致。
